Appearances:
Plaintiff Devendra Patel, is present. Represented by David Patel.

Defendant, Daniel Marian, is present.

The Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
